meaning: n.小蜘蛛网,蛛丝,薄纱,轻而弱者adj.薄弱的,轻飘飘的
examples: Gossamer is floating in calm air.
No, nothing, not even gossamer-like traces.
They quickly stripped me of my clothes and bound me like a mummy in a gossamer web.
In 1979, 26-year-old cyclist Bryan Allen flew the man-powered "Gossamer Albatross" across the English Channel.
MacCready would go on to claim a second Kremer prize with another Gossamer: the Albatross.
